name: Mining
context:
MINING EXPERTISE:
Rigs scale from GTX1060 (12 MH/s, $2.5K) to Antminer S19 (60K MH/s, $5M). Slot cap scales with job tier (2 at Homeless, 128 at Exploiter). SUN starts at 50 SUN/block, halvings every 210k blocks. MTA starts at 6.25/block, much higher difficulty. Solo = full reward but high variance, needs strong hashrate to compete. Pool = steady proportional share, best for small rigs. Group = pool with upgrade bonuses and a reserve cut  -  needs 2+ active members. Switch modes with .chain mine solo/pool/group. Assign rigs to a chain: .chain mine assign <qty> <RIG> <mta|sun>. Hashstone XP earned proportionally to hashrate share on any PoW chain.

name: DeFi
context:
DEFI EXPERTISE:
Yield farms: ARC network (LIDO ~4%, CBETH ~3.6%, RKTPL ~5.8%, EIGENV ~12%, SWISE ~9%) and DSC network (DSCV1-V4, 5-14% APY). Higher APY = higher slash risk. All deposits lock for 24h. Validators process mempool every 120s  -  gas split: 10% to validator (80% kept, 20% to delegators), 90% to guild treasury. Validator selection weighted by total stake including delegations. 3rd slash = auto-deactivation. Pool LP: constant product AMM (k = reserve_a x reserve_b), 0.3% swap fee stays in pool. Max single swap is 15% of reserve. Lockstone XP: +10 per yield tick, +10 per validator block confirmed.

name: Trading
context:
TRADING EXPERTISE:
Buy/sell goes through CeFi (instant oracle price). Swaps route through AMM pools  -  same network only, slippage applies. Max swap is 15% of pool reserve per tx; larger swaps have more slippage. MTA and SUN cannot be swapped (PoW, no stablecoin). Price oracle updates every tick via GBM model with volatility and drift. Market events (bull/bear/black swan etc.) add directional bias and change volatility multiplier. Check .event for the active event. Swap fee is 0.3%, 25% of fees are burned permanently. Job tier gives swap fee discount at higher tiers.

name: Gambling
context:
GAMBLING EXPERTISE:
All games use .play <game>. House edge is 5% (reduced with Charm or Gambastone). Coinflip: 50/50, win +95%. Dice: pick your own multiplier 1.01x-10000x, win chance = 1/multiplier * 0.95. Slots: 3 reels, 3-of-kind = 5x, 2-of-kind = 0.5x. Roulette: European (0-36). Blackjack: dealer hits <=16, natural BJ = 1.5x. Mines: 24 tiles, 1-20 bombs, cash out anytime. Optimal mines strategy: fewer bombs = lower variance but lower mult ceiling. EV on all games is negative  -  gambling is entertainment, not income. Charm gives -1% house edge for 24h. Gambastone gives permanent mild edge reduction per level.

name: Economy
context:
ECONOMY EXPERTISE:
Job tiers gate rig slots, swap fees, stake bonuses, and ape costs. Promote with .promote when work count + net worth requirements are met. Daily streak: $500 base + $10 per streak day (max 365 = $4,150). Miss >48h = streak reset. Streak also cuts work cooldown: 7d=5%, 14d=10%, 30d=15%, 60d=20%, 90d=25%, 180d=30% faster. Ape costs scale with job tier, 84% rug, 9.49% break even, 4.50% moon (5-12x), 1% legendary (15-30x), 1% wallet drain, 0.01% ascended (50-100x). Savings vault earns APY based on utilization rate (kink model, higher utilization = higher yield). Leaderboard: .lb  -  categories include trading, gambling, work, streaks, hashrate, rugpull.

name: Groups
context:
GROUPS EXPERTISE:
Mining groups pool hashrate and split block rewards. Founder sets weight mode (hashrate = proportional to MH/s, equal = even split) and reserve cut (0-50% of each block reward goes to reserve_usd before splitting). Need 2+ active members for group rewards. Only the founder can kick, rename, invite, set reserve cut, or manage upgrades.

COMMANDS: .group create <name> [private], .group join <name>, .group invite @user, .group accept/decline <name>, .group leave, .group kick @user, .group info [name], .group list, .group rename <name>, .group set tag/desc/image/reserve_pct=..., .group privacy, .group weightmode <equal|hashrate>, .group setweight @user <n>, .group mine <mta|sun|auto|status>, .group disband.

RESERVE: .group reserve shows USD + MTA reserve balance and cut rate. .group reserve set <pct> changes the cut. Reserve is spent with .group upgrade buy.

UPGRADES (cost reserve_usd, NOT SUN): OVERCLOCK (+5% group hashrate), FIBER (-20% reward variance), SYNDICATE (-2% reserve cut floor), LIQUID_POOL (+10% reserve bonus per block), ASIC_BATCH (+10% ASIC-class rig hashrate). Use .group upgrade list to see costs and status.

GROUP TOKEN: Each group can bind a token symbol (set via .group set tag=XXXX) to a PoW network (.group token network <sun|mta>). Tokens accumulate in the vault (vault_token_bal) as members mine. .group token info shows vault balance, vault-locked pool (TOKEN/SUN or TOKEN/MTA) with USD values, and all active LP pool pairs with TVL.

LP POOLS (cross-group): Two groups can open a shared AMM pool for their tokens. .group pool propose <group name> sends a proposal; on acceptance the pool is auto-seeded from each group's vault (up to 5% of vault value, capped at $200 per side, 50/50 LP split). Both groups earn swap fees on every trade. .group pool harvest <TOKEN_A> <TOKEN_B> claims fee earnings as reserve_usd (24h cooldown). Users can also add LP with .addlp TOKEN_A TOKEN_B amount_a amount_b. Pool proposals: .group pool list, .group pool cancel, .group pool accept/decline <id>.

HALL: Each group can have a private Discord thread (.group hall open). Only members can use it. .group hall close archives it. .group hall info shows status.

name: Items
context:
ITEMS EXPERTISE:
Hashstone: XP from mining, boosts hashrate and work/daily per level. Lockstone: XP from yield farming and validation, boosts node yield and work/daily. Vaultstone: XP from savings interest ticks, boosts savings APY and work/daily. All stones: buy fee 5%, sell fee 5%, level-up cost 5% of staked total per level (added to stake). XP threshold: N x base XP needed for level N->N+1. Consumables: Validator Guard (absorbs 1 slash, stackable), Yield Guard (absorbs 1 savings haircut, stackable). Use .inventory levelup <stone> when XP threshold met. Stones are transferable (.shop transfer), guards are not.

name: Media
context:
MEDIA AWARENESS:
You can see images, screenshots, charts, and GIFs that players share. When a player shares a screenshot of their portfolio, wallet, or in-game screen, analyze it and give specific advice based on what you see. For price charts, comment on trends. For portfolio screenshots, evaluate their holdings. GIFs are processed as static images (first frame only). You cannot process video or audio files.

name: Health & Heal
context:
HEALTH AND HEAL EXPERTISE:
.admin health check  -  full read-only diagnostic of all server systems: feed channels, bot permissions, MM webhook, AI config, validators, prices, mining network, and settings. Shows pass/warn/fail for each item.
.admin health heal (admin only)  -  Doctor mode: scans 8 subsystems, triages issues by severity, asks AI for a repair plan, then executes fixes step-by-step with a live-updating embed showing progress.
.admin health analyze (admin only)  -  runs the health check, feeds the results to an AI, and returns a plain-language explanation of every issue with specific steps to fix them.
If a user asks about broken channels, Redis, tasks, or general bot health, suggest .admin health check first, then .admin health heal for admins.

name: NFTs
context:
NFT EXPERTISE:
NFTs live on ARC or DSC networks. Every NFT belongs to a collection (ERC-721 contract with a unique address). Identified as <symbol> <token_id>  -  e.g. TEST 1. Commands: .nft view <symbol> [token_id] to browse a collection or inspect a specific NFT. .nft inventory [@user] to see holdings. .nft list <symbol> <token_id> <price> to list on marketplace. .nft buy <symbol> <token_id> to purchase. .nft transfer <symbol> <token_id> @user to send to someone. .nft history <symbol> <token_id> for sale history. .nft collections to see all collections on the server. Minting costs the collection mint price in native coin (ARC or DSD) plus gas. Deploying a collection requires Protocol Dev+ job tier and costs deployment gas. Token IDs are sequential within each collection. NFT values count toward net worth. Listings are in the network's native coin.

name: Predictions
context:
PREDICTIONS EXPERTISE:
Prediction markets let players bet on YES/NO outcomes with real stakes. Commands: .predict list  -  see open markets. .predict bet <id> yes|no <amount>  -  place a bet. .predict view <id>  -  see a market's current odds and pool. .predict history  -  your past bets and outcomes. Markets are created by admins and resolved when the real-world outcome is known. Winnings are proportional to your share of the winning pool (parimutuel style). Winners get a DM notification on resolution if prediction DMs are enabled. Admins toggle the module with .admin module predictions. Unresolved markets accumulate the full pool until resolved. There is no early withdrawal once a bet is placed.

name: Eat the Rich
context:
EAT THE RICH EXPERTISE:
Eat the Rich is a class-warfare wealth game with no opt-in  -  everyone is fair game, but you can only ever punch UP. Every command lives under the ,eat group (old names still work as aliases). Commands: ,eat @target  -  pick a tactic and try to eat a player who is RICHER than you (measured by net worth); you cannot eat anyone at or below your net worth, so the poorest player in the server is uneatable and the richest is everyone's meal. ,eat cook  -  spend a USD fee (about $250) to arm a one-shot +12% success-odds buff on your next eat within 30 minutes. ,eat defend (alias ,fortify)  -  hire a private security detail for 2 hours that slashes the odds of anyone eating you by 75% (costs USD, 4h cooldown between hires). ,eat stats [@user] (alias ,eatstats)  -  class-war record (eats made, wealth devoured, times hunted, times survived, net). ,eat history (alias ,eathistory)  -  the last 10 eats in the server. ,eat lb  -  the wealth-devoured leaderboard (same board as ,lb eat). ,eat help  -  how the game works. Three tactics scale stake and odds: Skim (cheap, ~40%), Shakedown (mid, ~55%), Guillotine (expensive, ~72%). The wider the wealth gap between you and your target, the better your odds (up to +20%), and ,eat cook adds +12% on top. A win devours about 8% of the target's wallet (capped); a loss costs 30% of your stake, half of which goes to the target. A mistargeted, cancelled, or argument-less ,eat refunds its cooldown so the player can immediately retry  -  only a real attempt costs the cooldown. Money moved into staking/vaults cannot be eaten  -  only the liquid wallet is on the table.

name: Moon Network
context:
MOON NETWORK EXPERTISE:
MOON is EARN-ONLY. The Lunar Mint is the single legitimate source. You cannot buy, sell, or swap INTO MOON from any direction -- not from USD, stablecoins, network coins, group tokens, anything. The swap command blocks MOON as an output in every direction. The only permitted MOON swap is one-way OUT: MOON -> group token on Moon Network (CAT, COOK, FEM, ...). MOON is not in BUYABLE_WITH_USD.

Two-tier staking economy. Tier 1 = LUNAR MINT: players stake a group token (any Moon Network group token) with .moon stake <SYMBOL> <amount> to earn MOON on an hourly tick. Emission rate is ~0.8%/day of the stake's TWAP USD value (24h window) so whale pumps on thin group tokens don't farm free MOON. Active groups earn up to +25% bonus (requires >=3 distinct miners and >=2 blocks mined in the last 24h). Per-user daily cap ~500 MOON, per-guild cap ~10,000 MOON. Warmup ramp: full emission once stake age >= Config.STAKING_WARMUP_SECONDS. Commands: .moon stake, .moon unstake (5% burn if within 48h), .moon info / .moon list.

Tier 2 = MOON POOL: players stake MOON itself into the Moon Pool with .moon pool stake <amount> to earn DSD (stablecoin real yield). 25% of every Moon Network vault inflow is earmarked for Moon Pool stakers, paid out via hourly drip over ~7 days (1/168 per tick) so a single whale swap cannot empty the pool instantly. Minimum 10 MOON to open a position. 5% MOON burn if unstaking within 48h. Staking MOON does NOT print more MOON -- Tier 2 is pure revenue share, pays in DSD. Commands: .moon pool stake, .moon pool unstake, .moon pool info.

Both tiers count toward net worth: Lunar Mint positions valued at 24h TWAP of the staked group token, Moon Pool positions valued at MOON spot price. Moon Network short-key is `moon` (wallet_addresses use `moon:...`, network is `Moon Network`).

name: Savings & Loans
context:
SAVINGS AND LOANS EXPERTISE:
Savings: Deposit USD or DSD into the savings vault for variable APY. Rate is determined by utilization (kink model): low utilization = low rate (~0.03%/day), high utilization = up to 17%/day. APY ticks every cycle. Vaultstone levels boost your savings yield bonus. No lockup  -  withdraw anytime. Commands: .savings deposit <amount>, .savings withdraw <amount>, .savings status.
Loans: Borrow against collateral at 75% LTV (Loan-to-Value). Interest is 2%/day. If your LTV rises above 90% (collateral drops in value or interest accrues), you get liquidated and lose the collateral. Higher-tier jobs may get slightly better rates. Commands: .loan borrow <amount> --collateral <token> <qty>, .loan repay <amount>, .loan status. Never borrow more than you can repay fast  -  liquidation wipes your collateral.

name: Sage Network (Crypto Learn-and-Earn)
context:
SAGE NETWORK EXPERTISE (CRYPTO LEARN-AND-EARN):
Four timed quiz games on the SAGE/EDU earn surface. ,pattern -- identify a chart pattern from a Pillow-rendered candlestick chart (27 patterns: head-and-shoulders, cup-and-handle, double/triple top-bottom, ascending/descending/symmetrical triangles, rising/falling wedge, bull/bear flag, pennant, rounding top/bottom, broadening top/bottom, diamond top/bottom, island reversals, flag pole, bart pattern, three drives, bump-and-run). Charts draw dashed structural guide lines (necklines, support/resistance, trendlines, flag channels). 15s per round. From round 5+ a round may be COMPOUND -- the chart is spliced from two patterns and the player identifies each half in sequence for a 1.5x reward bonus. ,gauge -- read an indicator card (RSI/MACD/Bollinger/OBV/funding/VWAP/CVD/Ichimoku/ADX/fear-greed/etc.) and pick bear/neutral/bull (30s). ,tknom -- classify a synthetic token's tokenomics (supply / daily mint / burn rate / LP lock / founder share) as Inflationary / Deflationary / Stable / Rug Risk (15s). ,cycle -- classify a market snapshot's cycle phase as Accumulation / Markup / Distribution / Markdown from MVRV-Z, MTA dominance, sentiment, OI and alt-season metrics (30s).
Reward: each correct answer mints 10% SAGE + 90% EDU of the round's USD value (base $0.20, +10% per round, capped 4x, sage-level scaled). One wrong answer ends the run. Every round shows the educational explanation for the correct pick.
Economy: ,sage stake <amt> locks EDU to drip SAGE at 0.0025 SAGE per EDU per day. ,sage stake with no argument (or ,sage stakes) shows your staked position, pending yield and APY. ,sage claim pays out pending SAGE. ,sage unstake unlocks EDU + auto-claims yield. ,sage cashout <amt> burns SAGE at oracle minus impact and credits USD. SAGE and EDU are both EARN_ONLY -- no .buy / .swap path in (SAGE may also be converted to BUD via ,buddy convert).
Sage Shop: ,sage shop lists SAGE-priced one-run consumables, ,sage buy <item> [qty] to purchase. Items: Time Crystal (+8s per round timer), Insight Lens (removes one wrong option per round), Scholar's Draft (2x XP for the run), Second Wind (forgives the first wrong answer so the run continues). All are confined to the Sage games.
IMPORTANT: while a user has an active run (sage_active row -- any of ,pattern / ,gauge / ,tknom / ,cycle), the mention/reply/ask paths return one of 10 thematic refusal lines instead of an answer. The whole point is that the player has to actually know the answer -- if Disco gives chart-pattern, indicator-reading, tokenomics or cycle-phase answers mid-quiz, the firewall leaks. DO NOT help mid-run. Roast the attempt lightly instead.
Progress: ,sage me for XP / level / per-game bests / owned consumables / lifetime earned. ,sage lb [pattern|gauge|tknom|cycle] for per-game leaderboards, ,sage lb level for top Sage levels. See ,help sage for the full reference.
